has Evolved.

Business on
the Edge Network

View Our Customer Success

+

>75 Active

Customers

Go beyond the Cloud

Edge's technology connects discrete devices to form a compute layer, enhancing the delivery of faster and more efficient digital services. Owned and operated collectively, it redistributes revenues from major tech companies like Amazon, Google, and Microsoft to individual node operators.
Past & Present

Centralised Cloud Services

New & Future

Decentralised Edge Network

Sound Interesting? Sign up with us today and start building.

SWITCH TO THE EDGE

Experience Unmatched Innovation

Tighter Data Security

Edge Network files are encrypted and distributed into numerous fragments, eliminating single-machine storage risks and ensuring a more secure platform than traditional storage methods.

Your data is never in one place.
It's stored all over the world.
01 Content
02 Encrypt
03 Fragment
04 Distribute
CDN Speed Comparison

Using monocle.com as the benchmark for traffic/usage profile.

Edge CDN

100%

imgix CDN

74.23%

Fastly

67.25%

Rackspace CDN

58.25%

Amazon Cloudfront

56.05%

CDN77

50.88%

Faster Content Delivery

Edges architecture optimizes local peering by directing traffic from nodes near end consumers, even delivering within the local network loop, minimizing data distance and volume for enhanced service performance.

Cost Cutting Technology

Edge's technology enables discrete devices to connect together to create a compute layer that can be used to deliver faster and more efficient digital services.

Avg

30%
Savings

Award Winning Products

From De-Centralised Hosting to Faster DNS, we got you covered.

Edge Pages

Edge's technology enables discrete devices to connect together to create a compute layer that can be used to deliver faster and more efficient digital services.

Launch
Documentation
More

Virtual Machines

Virtual machines at the edge of the network. A balanced array of resources supporting a wide range of applications. From personal projects to enterprise apps.

Launch
Documentation
More

Edge Content Delivery

High performance content delivery with a built in image pipeline and just-in-time processing. Gets your content closer to your customers than any other CDN.

Launch
Documentation
More

Domains

Just like normal DNS, but hyper-distributed. Edge DNS is topographically aware, connecting your customers to your platform as quickly as possible.

Launch
Documentation
More
Sign up and we will get you up and running in no time.
GET STARTED

Earn $XE Tokens By Contributing Your Spare Capacity to the Edge

Anyone with a laptop, mobile or any connected device can earn $XE tokens by providing spare computational and storage capacity to the network. $XE tokens can be traded for Edge services, or converted into other currencies.

JOIN US NOW

Why Decentralized Computing is Necessary for Fast Scaling AI Capabilities

Updates

Announcements

Edge Ups the VM Ante

Edge has just rolled out a major update, transforming the virtual machine landscape with up to 32GB RAM, 32 vCPUs, a massive 2TB of disk space, and lightning-fast 1Gbps connectivity. Dive into the future of edge computing where performance meets limitless potential.

19.02.24

Will Lebens
